description: Unified key package management: publish new packages or sync with server (consolidates publishKeyPackages + syncKeyPackages + getKeyPackageStats)

main.description: Manage key packages for the authenticated user's device. Supports 'publish' to upload key packages, 'sync' to compare local hashes against server, 'stats' to fetch current counts, and 'requestReplenish' to ask peer devices to replenish missing key packages.

action.description: Action to perform: 'publish' to upload new key packages, 'sync' to reconcile local/server state, 'stats' to fetch counts, or 'requestReplenish' to ask peers to refresh device keys

keyPackages.description: Key packages to upload (required for 'publish' action, max 100)

localHashes.description: SHA256 hex hashes of key packages that exist in local storage (required for 'sync' action)

deviceId.description: Device ID to scope the operation. Required for 'sync', recommended for 'publish'.

targetDids.description: Peer DIDs to notify for 'requestReplenish' action

reason.description: Optional reason included in replenish notifications

convoId.description: Optional conversation context for peer replenish notifications

stats.description: Current key package statistics after the operation

syncResult.description: Detailed sync results (only present when action is 'sync')

publishResult.description: Detailed publish results (only present when action is 'publish')

replenishResult.description: Detailed replenish notification result (only present when action is 'requestReplenish')

errors.name: BatchTooLarge
errors.description: Batch size exceeds maximum of 100 key packages

cipherSuite.description: Cipher suite of the key package

expires.description: Expiration timestamp (required, max 90 days from now)

lastResort.description: Whether this is a reusable MLS last-resort key package

published.description: Total key packages ever published for this device

expired.description: Number of expired key packages pending cleanup

serverHashes.description: SHA256 hex hashes of available key packages on server AFTER cleanup

orphanedCount.description: Number of orphaned key packages detected

orphanedHashes.description: SHA256 hex hashes of orphaned key packages that were deleted during sync

deletedCount.description: Number of orphaned key packages successfully deleted

remainingAvailable.description: Number of valid key packages remaining after cleanup

deviceId.description: Device ID that was synced (echoed back for confirmation)

succeeded.description: Number of key packages successfully uploaded

failed.description: Number of key packages that failed to upload

errors.description: Detailed error information for failed uploads

requested.description: Whether the replenish request was accepted

deviceCount.description: Number of target devices with registered push tokens

deliveredCount.description: Number of replenish notifications accepted by the push provider

index.description: Zero-based index of the key package that failed
